nodes.itemHTML: • ln-paywallstars110 - Go middleware for monetizing APIs on a per-request basis with the Lightning Network (Bitcoin).
• dotstars54 - distributed sync using operational transformation/OT.

• pry-railsstars1.3k - Avoid repeating yourself, use pry-rails instead of copying the initializer to every rails project. This is a small gem which causes rails console to open pry. It therefore depends on pry.
• scallopstars594 - A simple Scala CLI parsing library.

• Babel - 🛠️ - 🐙stars39k - compiler for writing next generation JavaScript; Babel will turn your ES6+ code into ES5 friendly code, so you can start using it right now without waiting for browser support.

• Sass - 🛠️ - 🐙stars13.2k - Sass is an extension of CSS3, adding nested rules, variables, mixins, selector inheritance, and more. It's translated to well-formatted, standard CSS using the command line tool or a web-framework plugin.
• mqttwarnstars842 - Subscribe to MQTT topics (with wildcards) and notify pluggable services.

• UralicNLPstars34 - An open source Python library for processing morphologically rich and, for the most part, endangered Uralic languages. It can do morphological analysis, generation, lemmatization, disambiguation and lexical lookup for a great many Uralic languages.

    Open Source Event Manager. An event management tool tailored to Free and Open Source Software conferences

    A generic system to build and distribute packages from sources in an automatic, consistent and reproducible way.
